items.title: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
items.dek: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.
items.body: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.

items.title: What we know after latest escalation in Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions
items.dek: Bombings by Pakistan are the most significant development in tensions between the two neighbours - though the physical impact remains unclear.
items.body: Bombings by Pakistan are the most significant development in tensions between the two neighbours - though the physical impact remains unclear.
